item.title: Creamy, bright and delicious: Pasta al limone
item.description: Pasta al Limone is a simple summer pasta that’s creamy, bright and deliciously lemony. The combination of butter, lemon zest and juice, heavy cream and pasta water, gives you an intensely craveable pasta recipe. Serve this with my Limoncello Tiramisu and an Aperol Spritz for the most delicious Italian dinner.

media:content.media:title: Creamy, bright and delicious: Pasta al limone
media:content.media:description: Pasta al Limone is a simple summer pasta that’s creamy, bright and deliciously lemony. The combination of butter, lemon zest and juice, heavy cream and pasta water, gives you an intensely craveable pasta recipe. Serve this with my Limoncello Tiramisu and an Aperol Spritz for the most delicious Italian dinner.

item.title: Today's dinner: Greek Lemon Potatoes
item.description: These Greek Lemon Potatoes are baked in a bright, savory lemon broth that’s deeply flavorful. The broth is poured over the potatoes so they can soak it all up. As they bake, the potatoes turn tender, glossy, and packed with lemony goodness. I love to serve these with my Mediterranean Chicken for a healthy weeknight meal.

media:content.media:title: Today's dinner: Greek Lemon Potatoes
media:content.media:description: These Greek Lemon Potatoes are baked in a bright, savory lemon broth that’s deeply flavorful. The broth is poured over the potatoes so they can soak it all up. As they bake, the potatoes turn tender, glossy, and packed with lemony goodness. I love to serve these with my Mediterranean Chicken for a healthy weeknight meal.

item.title: Dubai Chocolate Tiramisu Recipe
item.description: This Dubai Chocolate Tiramisu recipe is a riff on the viral dubai chocolate bar. Fluffy mascarpone filling is layered with ladyfingers, kataifi, pistachio cream (or pistachio butter), strawberries and dusted with cocoa powder. This is an easy, no-bake dessert everyone will love!

media:content.media:title: Dubai Chocolate Tiramisu Recipe
media:content.media:description: This Dubai Chocolate Tiramisu recipe is a riff on the viral dubai chocolate bar. Fluffy mascarpone filling is layered with ladyfingers, kataifi, pistachio cream (or pistachio butter), strawberries and dusted with cocoa powder. This is an easy, no-bake dessert everyone will love!

item.title: One-Pan Shrimp Pasta Made in 30 Minutes
item.description: This Calabrian Chili Shrimp Pasta is creamy, spicy, and comes together in under 30 minutes. It’s an easy weeknight dinner that feels a little special without extra work. Serve it up with an aperol spritz and make it a really happy hour at home.

media:content.media:title: One-Pan Shrimp Pasta Made in 30 Minutes
media:content.media:description: This Calabrian Chili Shrimp Pasta is creamy, spicy, and comes together in under 30 minutes. It’s an easy weeknight dinner that feels a little special without extra work. Serve it up with an aperol spritz and make it a really happy hour at home.

item.title: Crispy, Cheesy, Savory Make Ahead Empanadas
item.description: These In-N-Out Empanadas take everything I love about a classic burger—savory beef, caramelized onions, pickles, and melty American cheese—and wrap it in a crisp, golden shell. They’re especially great for entertaining because they can be assembled in advance, frozen, and cooked straight from the freezer when you’re ready. You can pan-fry them the day of, or pop them into the air fryer for an easy, hands-off option, then serve them with a tangy burger sauce for dipping.

media:content.media:title: Crispy, Cheesy, Savory Make Ahead Empanadas
media:content.media:description: These In-N-Out Empanadas take everything I love about a classic burger—savory beef, caramelized onions, pickles, and melty American cheese—and wrap it in a crisp, golden shell. They’re especially great for entertaining because they can be assembled in advance, frozen, and cooked straight from the freezer when you’re ready. You can pan-fry them the day of, or pop them into the air fryer for an easy, hands-off option, then serve them with a tangy burger sauce for dipping.

item.title: Steak Salad with Creamy Chimichurri Dressing
item.description: This Steak Salad with Creamy Chimichurri Dressing is crisp, herby, and satisfying without feeling heavy. Quick-seared steak, tender greens, and a bright yogurt-based herb dressing come together in this beautiful salad that tastes as good as it looks. I love to pair this salad with my homemade crispy french fries. The salad and fries combo is perfection, let me know what you think!

media:content.media:title: Steak Salad with Creamy Chimichurri Dressing
media:content.media:description: This Steak Salad with Creamy Chimichurri Dressing is crisp, herby, and satisfying without feeling heavy. Quick-seared steak, tender greens, and a bright yogurt-based herb dressing come together in this beautiful salad that tastes as good as it looks. I love to pair this salad with my homemade crispy french fries. The salad and fries combo is perfection, let me know what you think!

item.title: Soft & Gooey Banana Bread Cinnamon Rolls
item.description: These Banana Bread Cinnamon Rolls combine the cozy flavor of banana bread with soft, swirled cinnamon rolls for the best of both worlds. They’re extra gooey, banana-filled, and topped with a brown butter cream cheese frosting. Pair them with my matcha latte for a brunch-worthy spread.

media:content.media:title: Soft & Gooey Banana Bread Cinnamon Rolls
media:content.media:description: These Banana Bread Cinnamon Rolls combine the cozy flavor of banana bread with soft, swirled cinnamon rolls for the best of both worlds. They’re extra gooey, banana-filled, and topped with a brown butter cream cheese frosting. Pair them with my matcha latte for a brunch-worthy spread.

item.title: I Tried to Make British Scones
item.description: Here's the recipe i gave a try: 3 tablespoons sugar 2 teaspoons orange zest or earl grey tea leaves 1 3/4 cups all-purpose flour 2 tablespoons unsalted butter, cold and cubed 1/2 teaspoon kosher salt 2 1/2 teaspoons baking powder 2 large eggs, divided 1/2 cup milk

media:content.media:title: I Tried to Make British Scones
media:content.media:description: Here's the recipe i gave a try: 3 tablespoons sugar 2 teaspoons orange zest or earl grey tea leaves 1 3/4 cups all-purpose flour 2 tablespoons unsalted butter, cold and cubed 1/2 teaspoon kosher salt 2 1/2 teaspoons baking powder 2 large eggs, divided 1/2 cup milk

item.title: Delicious Pumpkin Tres Leches Cake
item.description: The Pumpkin Tres Leches Cake, which can be baked in just 20 minutes, is a fall take on our classic Tres Leches Cake. With its luscious three-milk soak and homemade pumpkin pie spice, it’s a cake that’s moist, warm and super delicious.

media:content.media:title: Delicious Pumpkin Tres Leches Cake
media:content.media:description: The Pumpkin Tres Leches Cake, which can be baked in just 20 minutes, is a fall take on our classic Tres Leches Cake. With its luscious three-milk soak and homemade pumpkin pie spice, it’s a cake that’s moist, warm and super delicious.

item.title: Your Next Dinner Idea: Lemon Pepper Carbonara
item.description: This lemon pepper carbonara is the perfect synergy of lemon zest and spicy black pepper. It works beautifully with creamy egg yolks and salty bits of bacon. This makes for the perfect weeknight meal.

media:content.media:title: Your Next Dinner Idea: Lemon Pepper Carbonara
media:content.media:description: This lemon pepper carbonara is the perfect synergy of lemon zest and spicy black pepper. It works beautifully with creamy egg yolks and salty bits of bacon. This makes for the perfect weeknight meal.

item.title: Homemade Animal Style Fries Recipe
item.description: These Animal Style Fries are crispy, cheesy, and topped with sweet caramelized onions and tangy burger sauce. This recipe is simple to make at home with frozen or homemade fries. Serve them up alongside my smash burger recipe for the best fast-food-style dinner at home.

media:content.media:title: Homemade Animal Style Fries Recipe
media:content.media:description: These Animal Style Fries are crispy, cheesy, and topped with sweet caramelized onions and tangy burger sauce. This recipe is simple to make at home with frozen or homemade fries. Serve them up alongside my smash burger recipe for the best fast-food-style dinner at home.
